import { useSyncExternalStore } from "/@id/__x00__figma:react-base";
const state = {
  workflows: {
    "seed-demo-1": {
      documentId: "seed-demo-1",
      title: "Manual Handling Policy (Demo)",
      author: "Sarah Chen",
      status: "pending-review",
      comments: [
        {
          id: "sc-1",
          sectionTitle: "2. Scope",
          author: "Emma Wilson",
          authorRole: "Compliance Manager",
          content: "Scope should explicitly cover contractors and volunteers.",
          timestamp: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
          status: "open",
          replies: []
        }
      ],
      assignedRoles: [],
      requireAcknowledgment: false,
      acknowledgments: [],
      submittedAt: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString(),
      lastUpdated: (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString()
    }
  }
};
const listeners = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set();
function notify() {
  listeners.forEach((l) => l());
}
function now() {
  return (/* @__PURE__ */ new Date()).toISOString();
}
function uid(prefix) {
  return `${prefix}-${Date.now()}-${Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 7)}`;
}
export const documentWorkflowStore = {
  subscribe(listener) {
    listeners.add(listener);
    return () => listeners.delete(listener);
  },
  getSnapshot() {
    return state.workflows;
  },
  get(id) {
    return state.workflows[id];
  },
  list() {
    return Object.values(state.workflows);
  },
  ensure(documentId, title, author) {
    if (!state.workflows[documentId]) {
      state.workflows[documentId] = {
        documentId,
        title,
        author,
        status: "draft",
        comments: [],
        assignedRoles: [],
        requireAcknowledgment: false,
        acknowledgments: [],
        lastUpdated: now()
      };
      notify();
    }
    return state.workflows[documentId];
  },
  submitForReview(documentId, title, author) {
    const wf = this.ensure(documentId, title, author);
    wf.status = "pending-review";
    wf.submittedAt = now();
    wf.revisionNote = void 0;
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  addComment(documentId, params) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return;
    wf.comments.push({
      id: uid("cmt"),
      sectionTitle: params.sectionTitle,
      author: params.author,
      authorRole: params.authorRole,
      content: params.content,
      timestamp: now(),
      status: "open",
      replies: []
    });
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  replyToComment(documentId, commentId, params) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    const cmt = wf?.comments.find((c) => c.id === commentId);
    if (!cmt) return;
    cmt.replies.push({
      id: uid("rply"),
      author: params.author,
      authorRole: params.authorRole,
      content: params.content,
      timestamp: now()
    });
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  resolveComment(documentId, commentId) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    const cmt = wf?.comments.find((c) => c.id === commentId);
    if (!cmt) return;
    cmt.status = "resolved";
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  reopenComment(documentId, commentId) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    const cmt = wf?.comments.find((c) => c.id === commentId);
    if (!cmt) return;
    cmt.status = "open";
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  canApprove(documentId) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return false;
    if (wf.status !== "pending-review") return false;
    return wf.comments.every((c) => c.status === "resolved");
  },
  approve(documentId, approvedBy) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return;
    if (!this.canApprove(documentId)) return;
    wf.status = "approved";
    wf.approvedAt = now();
    wf.approvedBy = approvedBy;
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  requestRevision(documentId, note, requestedBy) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return;
    wf.status = "revision-requested";
    wf.revisionNote = note;
    wf.revisionRequestedAt = now();
    wf.approvedBy = requestedBy;
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  publish(documentId, assignedRoles, publishedBy, requireAcknowledgment = false) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return;
    if (wf.status !== "approved") return;
    wf.status = "published";
    wf.assignedRoles = assignedRoles;
    wf.requireAcknowledgment = requireAcknowledgment;
    wf.acknowledgments = [];
    wf.publishedAt = now();
    wf.publishedBy = publishedBy;
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  acknowledge(documentId, staffName, staffRole) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return;
    if (wf.status !== "published") return;
    if (wf.acknowledgments.some((a) => a.staffName === staffName)) return;
    wf.acknowledgments.push({
      staffName,
      staffRole,
      acknowledgedAt: now()
    });
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  },
  hasAcknowledged(documentId, staffName) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    return !!wf?.acknowledgments.some((a) => a.staffName === staffName);
  },
  unpublish(documentId) {
    const wf = state.workflows[documentId];
    if (!wf) return;
    wf.status = "approved";
    wf.publishedAt = void 0;
    wf.assignedRoles = [];
    wf.lastUpdated = now();
    notify();
  }
};
export function useDocumentWorkflow(documentId) {
  const snap = useSyncExternalStore(
    documentWorkflowStore.subscribe,
    documentWorkflowStore.getSnapshot,
    documentWorkflowStore.getSnapshot
  );
  return documentId ? snap[documentId] : void 0;
}
export function useAllWorkflows() {
  const snap = useSyncExternalStore(
    documentWorkflowStore.subscribe,
    documentWorkflowStore.getSnapshot,
    documentWorkflowStore.getSnapshot
  );
  return Object.values(snap);
}

//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;base64,
